about.title: We are Africa's Trusted Gateway to Legitimate Minerals Sourcing
about.narrative1: Founded upon the core tenets of absolute transparency, corporate compliance, on-ground diligence, and regional Mining Act alignment, Mineral Dealers Africa (MDA) helps bridge the gap between global buyers and local mineral producers.
about.narrative2: Working directly with trusted mining cooperatives (ASM) in Uganda, Tanzania, and central Africa, we replace high-risk broker corridors with structured, bank-verified pipelines. We maintain direct relations with central authorities like the Directorate of Geological Survey and Mines (DGSM) to ensure all regulatory clearances, royalty computations, and export permits are processed cleanly.
about.mission.title: Our Mission
about.mission.desc: To sanitize the regional mineral trade by enforcing strict background vetting, double-blind assays, and legal export clearing, ensuring buyers receive genuine precious assets safely.
about.pipeline.title: Responsible Sourcing Pipeline
about.pipeline.desc: Enforcing OECD global standards to eradicate conflict-minerals and support certified artisanal mining collectives as an avenue for community development.
about.credentials.title: Corporate Credentials
about.credentials.footer: Board members hold active gold dealer consultation licenses and fully cooperate with regional enforcement entities.
services.title: Sourcing, Compliance & Advisory Services
services.desc: Mineral Dealers Africa provides a robust collection of professional services under one roof. We act as your on-ground eyes, ears, and compliance officers, verifying every ounce of gold, gemstone, and documentation to protect your transactions.
services.gold.title: Gold Sourcing & Procurement
services.gold.short: Vetted physical gold dust, nuggets, and LBMA standard gold bars.
services.gold.detail: Directly sourcing gold through certified smallholder mines and cooperatives across Uganda, Tanzania, and DR Congo. We manage complete chain-of-custodies, verify mineral tax stamps, and consolidate lots for secure transfer.
services.gold.benefit: Guaranteed provenance tracking and zero-middlemen trading margins.
services.gem.title: Precious Stone Sourcing
services.gem.short: Sourcing premium rough diamonds, tanzanite, emeralds, and sapphires.
services.gem.detail: Connecting collectors and jewelry refiners directly to primary mining fields (e.g. Lufwanyama emerald lots, Mirerani Block D Tanzanite collections, Lunda Sul diamonds). All diamonds carry authentic Kimberley certificates.
services.gem.benefit: Conflict-free certification and certified geological transparency.
services.vet.title: Supplier Verification & Vetting
services.vet.short: Background licensing checks and physical concession inspections.
services.vet.detail: Protecting your capital by deploying on-ground inspectors to verify if a local supplier possesses legal mining leases, active municipal licenses, and holds legitimate stocks as presented.
services.vet.benefit: Bypasses shell broker networks and fraudulent online intermediaries.
services.broker.title: Secured Mineral Brokerage
services.broker.detail: Drafting international standard contracts (FOB & CIF terms) tailored to regional mining laws, establishing escrow trusts, and securing clearing coordinates to coordinate legitimate transaction pathways.
services.broker.benefit: Reduces capital exposure using secure international vault channels.
services.due.title: Due Diligence & Compliance Reports
services.due.short: OECD Annex II and regional Uganda Mining Act compliance reporting.
services.due.detail: Conducting audit-ready operational research to satisfy institutional KYC standards. Reports include background sanctions matching, geological provenance records, and environmental code compliance checking.
services.due.benefit: Ensures absolute safety and legal eligibility for western importers.
services.export.title: Export & Customs Facilitation
services.export.short: Domestic royal tax clearing, customs stamp management.
services.export.detail: Managing all administrative clearances at Entebbe Airport (EBB). We process export permits with the DGSM, resolve provincial taxes and royalties, and issue authentic certificates of origin for flawless clearing.
services.export.benefit: Fast-tracks customs clearing with complete regulatory transparency.
services.consult.title: Mining Consultancy & Concessions
services.consult.short: Advisory on mining lease applications and machinery setup.
services.consult.detail: Assisting international joint-ventures on licensing routes. We consult on environmental impact assessment mandates, concession mapping, tax structures, and importing heavy mechanical mining machinery.
services.consult.benefit: Aligns concessions with Uganda’s latest Mining Act of 2022.
services.advis.title: Strategic Investment Advisory
services.advis.short: Risk management models for family offices & sovereign funds.
services.advis.detail: Fostering long-term market positions. We provide intelligence reports on localized mining codes, financial hedges, and capital-placement schemes for precious metals operations in Africa.
services.advis.benefit: Protects foreign capital against political and administrative hurdles.
services.refine.title: Refinery Coordination Solutions
services.refine.short: Upgrading metal purity inside verified regional facilities.
services.refine.detail: Managing raw metal transformation to high-investment grade gold bars (99.5%+). We supervise deliveries to government-certified local smelting refineries, witness smelting processes, and retrieve certified bar assays.
services.refine.benefit: Ensures you only export standard bullion certified by registered refiners.
services.assay.title: Assaying & Purity Verification
services.assay.short: Entebbe DGSM Geological spectrograph and laboratory assays.
services.assay.detail: Ensuring absolute karat verification. We witness mineral lot extraction and handle independent chemical assaying inside the Directorate of Geological Survey and Mines laboratories.
services.assay.benefit: Eliminates chemical fraud, ensuring you pay strictly for audited precious elements.
services.logis.title: Logistics, Shipping & Vault custody
services.logis.short: Brinks / G4S transit and high-security air transport.
services.logis.detail: Coordinating high-security physical transfers. Mineral parcels are escorted from the mine vault to domestic storage hubs, and cleared on international secure logistics airlines for final destination delivery.
services.logis.benefit: Ensures double-custody secure handoffs under continuous bank coverage.
services.intel.title: Market Intelligence & Forecasting
services.intel.short: Dynamic regional mineral pricing surveys and policy shifts.
services.intel.detail: Delivering comprehensive research. Studies explore policy trends, local royalty adjustments, and pricing variations inside community trading centers across East and Central Africa.
services.intel.benefit: Maintains your competitive edge using reliable regional insights.
miners.title: Empowering African Miners to Access Global Liquidity
miners.desc: Are you an authorized artisanal mining cooperative (ASM) or licensed dealer in East Africa? We help you connect directly with international jewelry refiners, commodities funds, and secure metal brokers in absolute alignment with the Uganda Mining Act 2022.
miners.sidebar.title: Alliance Privileges
miners.step1.title: Digital Registration
miners.step1.desc: Submit your corporate details, concession location, and municipal dealer license code using our digital register. Zero registration fees.
miners.step2.title: Physical Vetting & Assay
miners.step2.desc: An MDA compliance officer executes a brief site audit, checks concession parameters, and performs chemical assays inside Kampala laboratories.
miners.step3.title: Upload Mineral Listing
miners.step3.desc: Specify your stock category, origin country, certified purity level, and total available kilogram/carat bulk volume on our digital marketplace.
miners.step4.title: Secure Contract Handoff
miners.step4.desc: Upon buyer inquiries, secure escrow accounts guard transaction capitals. Transport teams escort stocks to Entebbe Airport under complete legal clearance.
miners.privilege1.title: Global Exposure
miners.privilege1.desc: Access verified premium jewelry brands and investment funds looking for ethical metal.
miners.privilege2.title: Direct Buyer Access
miners.privilege2.desc: Eradicates expensive broker networks, maximizing mineral profit yield direct to smallholders.
miners.privilege3.title: Professional Legal Support
miners.privilege3.desc: Full assistance with DGSM export permits, transport secure escorts, and assay logistics.
education.title: International Buyer Education Center
education.desc: Knowledge is the supreme defender of investor capital in African mineral trade. We publish definitive legal overviews, export templates, guidelines, and risk maps to shield global investors from compliance failures and fraudulent entities.
education.alert.title: Scam Alert Notice
education.alert.desc: If an unknown online supplier pitches you raw gold bullion with deep discounts exceeding 10% off the standard spot, demand physical on-ground verification. Mineral Dealers Africa provides prompt, independent audits.
education.additional.sec0.title: Gold Export Regulations & Royalties
education.additional.sec0.desc: Under Ugandan DGSM policies re-instituted in the Mining Act of 2022, unprocessed gold exports are highly protected to promote regional refining. For refined gold (99.5%+), exporters must clear a 5% royal tax on bullion, obtain custom state export permits, and carry certified assay reports.
education.additional.sec1.title: Understanding Gold Purity & Karat Weight
education.additional.sec1.desc: Physical gold in East Africa is mostly alluvial. Raw gold dust and nuggets generally test between 21K to 23K (87% to 96% pure gold). Pure investment bullion requires custom smelting and refining up to 24K (99.99% pure), performed inside verified local facilities.
education.additional.sec2.title: Export Documentation Checklist
education.additional.sec2.desc: A legal shipping container requires: 1) Valid Mineral Dealer License, 2) Official DGSM Export Permit, 3) Customs Bill of Lading, 4) Certificate of Origin from the Ministry of Energy and Mineral Development, 5) Authorized Independent Assaying Certificate.
investor.title: Strategic Mineral Investor Center
investor.desc: Africa presents outstanding geological yield potential. We advise family offices, luxury jewel houses, commodity trading desks, and bullion buyers on safe capital deployment structures designed to reduce regulatory risk.
investor.tier0.title: Physical Gold Arbitrage
investor.tier0.subtitle: Direct Procurement
investor.tier0.desc: Buy assayed alluvial nuggets or unrefined gold dust direct from local smallholder mines, and refine locally in Kampala to LBMA standards. MDA manages the provenance verification, transport secure escorts, and customs clearance.
investor.tier1.title: Mining Concessions & Equipment Finance
investor.tier1.subtitle: Capital Joint-Ventures
investor.tier1.desc: Capital injection into licensed artisanal cooperatives in Uganda and Tanzania to scale mechanical capability (e.g. wet magnetic separation plants, excavators) in exchange for direct metal yield contracts.
investor.protocol.title: Risk Management Protocol
investor.protocol.desc: All physical gold procurement deals are managed through secure regional accounts and escrow trusts. Asset transactions remain pending until neutral spectrograph reports are generated and signed by both parties.
investor.pillars.title: Procedural Verification Columns
investor.pillars.step1.title: Establish Corporate Presence & KYC
investor.pillars.step1.desc: Global buyers are registered into the Uganda Directorate portal (DGSM) and set up direct corporate banking channels to comply with anti-money laundering regulations.
investor.pillars.step2.title: Local Assay Auditing Integration
investor.pillars.step2.desc: Never wire funds prior to neutral fire assays. Minerals must be brought to Kampala, sampled, and assayed in governmental labs under strict legal observation.
investor.pillars.step3.title: EBB Exit Customs & Clearance
investor.pillars.step3.desc: All royalties (nominal 5% export tax on refined gold) must be paid, custom state certificates generated, and shipments sealed under double-custody rules.
blog.title: Africa Mineral Sourcing Journal
blog.desc: Our legal, geological, and commercial analysts post weekly research briefings regarding East African tax policies, pricing movements in Kampala, and licensing updates under the Uganda Mining Act 2022.
blog.disclaimer: The research above is designed purely for compliance awareness under regional Mining Acts. It does not constitute dynamic financial advisory.

contact.safety.desc: In compliance with anti-fraud statutes of the Uganda Mining Act 2022, random site walk-ins are forbidden. All physical meetings inside our Kampala smelting suites or bank chambers must be scheduled 24 hours in advance with verified KYC passports.
